summary: Tested DOMMMA Rent Agreements, AI Intelligence, Stripe Connect, and Browse page features. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend tests confirmed: Login flow works, Dashboard loads correctly, Rent Agreements page renders with tenant/landlord toggle, Browse page has Rent/Buy/Lease Takeover tabs, AI Document Intelligence page loads with manual input section.

minor.issue: Admin key in test_credentials.md (pray1234) doesn't match server default (dommma-admin-2026). Server uses ADMIN_SECRET_KEY env var with fallback to 'dommma-admin-2026'

integration_issues.issue: Document Builder (/document-builder) is only available in sidebar for landlord users, not renters. This is by design but may need clarification in requirements.

action_items: Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md to use correct admin key 'dommma-admin-2026' instead of 'pray1234'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user test@dommma.com / test123
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) User search API returns results, 2) Rent agreements API returns empty array for test users, 3) AI tenant document review works with Anthropic API, 4) Lease comparison returns BC RTA compliance data, 5) Stripe Connect status returns 404 for non-existent users (expected), 6) Admin stats works with key 'dommma-admin-2026', 7) Browse page has Rent/Buy/Lease Takeover tabs, 8) Rent Agreements page shows tenant/landlord toggle, 9) AI Document Intelligence page has manual input and document list sections. Document Builder is landlord-only feature.

backend_apis.GET /api/rent/agreements: PASS - Returns empty array or agreements
backend_apis.POST /api/ai/tenant-document-review: PASS - Returns AI review with risk score
backend_apis.GET /api/ai/lease-comparison: PASS - Returns BC RTA compliance data
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/database-stats: PASS - Returns stats with correct admin key

frontend_pages.login: PASS - Login with test@dommma.com / test123 works
frontend_pages.dashboard: PASS - Shows welcome message, rent payment card, sidebar navigation
frontend_pages.rent_agreements: PASS - Shows hero section, As Tenant/As Landlord toggle, Add Card button
frontend_pages.browse: PASS - Shows Rent/Buy/Lease Takeover tabs, filters, map integration
frontend_pages.document_review: PASS - Shows AI Document Intelligence title, Your Documents section, Paste Lease Text section
